Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x154E "SYSTEM15000-8000-154E" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $8000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "System 15000.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $8000 which: 1. copies 256 bytes of data from $8020 down to $0000 so that the dump can start at $0400 2. sets $0200 to $20 and $0201 to $35 to allow the game to start correctly
